lessons.title: 机场大巴问路
lessons.scene: 卢克刚抵达上海浦东机场，向机场工作人员询问去市区的巴士。

dialogue.speaker: 工作人员
dialogue.zh: 大巴吗？一直往前走，出三号门，往右拐。
dialogue.pinyin: Dàbā ma? Yìzhí wǎng qián zǒu, chū sān hào mén, wǎng yòu guǎi.
dialogue.en: The bus? Go straight ahead, exit through Gate 3, then turn right.

dialogue.speaker: 卢克
dialogue.pinyin: Sān hào mén yòu guǎi, duì ba?

dialogue.speaker: 工作人员
dialogue.pinyin: Duì, zài nàbiān páiduì shàng chē.
dialogue.en: That's right, queue over there to board.

dialogue.speaker: 卢克
dialogue.zh: 好的。请问是在车上买票吗？
dialogue.pinyin: Hǎo de. Qǐngwèn shì zài chē shàng mǎi piào ma?
dialogue.en: Got it. Excuse me, do we buy tickets on the bus?

dialogue.speaker: 工作人员
dialogue.zh: 对，上车扫码或者付现金都行。
dialogue.pinyin: Duì, shàng chē sǎo mǎ huòzhě fù xiànjīn dōu xíng.
dialogue.en: Yes, you can scan a QR code or pay cash on the bus.

correct.note: 问路常用表达，简洁直接。
